describe.intent: Catalog of language-specific anti-patterns with derived counters from session-end sweeps. Project-local source of truth, vault export. Three starter bash entries; one hookify rule consumer.

open_questions: Should bash-missing-fail-fast detection be tightened or accepted as coarse?
Should --full sweep auto-prune events for deleted source files?

review.note: All HIGH findings (PA-1, DA-1, S-1) addressed via prose edits to describe.md and spec.md. No mechanism redesign.

test.gating_step_flagged: AC14 form-2 (hook visibility empirical) before WU6

ac14_verification.verdict: rev3 design failed; rev4 mechanism (additionalContext) is correct
